name: Fizzy
description: Turn every Fizzy card into a chat channel with the OpenClaw agent while the card is in a chosen kanban column.

apiToken.description: Bearer access token for the bot (write permission)

mode.description: Inbound transport: 'webhook' (Fizzy pushes; needs a reachable gateway URL) or 'poll' (gateway pulls the activity feed; outbound-only, no tunnel)

boardIds.description: Optional board id(s) to scope the activity feed (poll mode)

webhookSecret.description: Signing secret of the Fizzy board webhook (HMAC-SHA256; webhook mode only)

activeColumnId.description: Column id in which cards become chat channels

agentId.description: Optional OpenClaw agent id to answer (defaults to the main agent)

botEmail.description: Email of the bot user; its own comments are skipped to avoid echo loops

greetOnEnter.description: Post a greeting comment when a card enters the active column
